response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack web/mobile software developer with strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role requires deep hardware expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no exposure to silicon design, deep learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or chip-level performance work. Educational background is a BS in CS with ~14 years of experience, but the experience domain does not align with a Principal-level hardware architect position.
strengths: Long tenure across diverse software stacks with senior/staff titles
Strong performance-oriented backend experience (low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Demonstrated technical leadership through talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware design experience whatsoever
No AI/deep-learning workload, GPU, or accelerator optimization background
No evidence of SIMD/MIMD, system architecture, or hardware-software co-design work

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
